titleStmt.title: SII 23.354: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 354. (A.R. No. 354 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 17: 1193-94 A.D.

summary.p: This is damaged. It registers a similar sale of a land called Kāḍugāḷ-kuḷam to the temple by a resident of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻachchēri another quarter of Ediriliśōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam (Vēmbaṟṟūr) who had previously purchased the same in state auction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai yuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉ Eḻāvatu vṛccikanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pratamaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamai
yum Uṭaiyār Irājarājiśva m virutarāyapayaṅkaravaḷa nāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu vempaṟṟūrāṉa Etirilicoḻaccaturvetimaṅ kalattu kulottuṅkacoḻacceri Araṇaippuṟa
ttu nilavilaiāvaṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvica lūruṭaiyār koyil mulavṛtti Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar tiruvaruḷāl Ikkoyil[śrī]kāriyañ ceyvārkkum tevarkaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṉuk kum Iṟṟaināḷ
kuḷanilamāvatu Ivvūr Eḻāṅkaṭṭaḷai Irācāciriyavatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻitevavāykkālukku teṟkku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇ ṭāñ catirattum muṉṟāñ catirattumāṉa Irācarācapperuvilai koṇṭu kaṭavenāy
nta kāṭukāḷkuḷameṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilam Āṟumākkāṇikkum kiḻpāṟkkellai vāṉavaṉmātevivatikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ikkuḷaṅ koṇṭaḻivāy sabhaippotuvāy varukiṟa kuḷattukku vaṭakkum
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pākaḷūr tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa kuḷam Āṟumāmuk
tiruvulakaḷantaruḷi vanta mikainilamum menokkiṉa maramum kiṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilai naṟkācu Āyi
koṇṭu viṟṟuk kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam kuṭutteṉ Ittiruvicalūruṭaiyā tevakaṉmikaḷukku Araṇaip puṟattu
tukku Ituve vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāva volaiyāvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutiporuḷc cilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātatākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu
poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇaicaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Inni veṇṭiṉapote vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukka kaṭave nākavum kuṭuttilenākil Ivvicaivutiṭṭe piramāṇamāvatākavum
piramāṇa Icaivuttiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ Ittiruvicalūruṭaiyār koyil mulavṛtti Āticaṇṭecuratevar tiruvaruḷāl śrī kāriyam cey vārkkum śrīmāheśvarakaṇkāṇi ceyvārkkum tevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakkaṉukkum Araṇai
ppuṟattu piramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭeḻuti vūrkkuṭi kāmattiya vicalūruṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭapiḷḷai Uttamappiriyaṉ makaṉ kaṟppakap piriya ṉeṉ Ivai EṉṉeḻuttuThe next five lines are highly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
